{{Infobox character
| name = Aunt Charity
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|used a void key}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Heart Sage]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|makes good elixirs}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

''See also: [[Aunt Charity Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Charity]] is a powerful [[Sage]] and [[Archlord]] within the [[Akura clan]] who possesses purple eyes. Despite being referred to as [[Mercy]]'s aunt, she is actually [[Mercy]]'s grand-niece; the title is used because [[Charity]] is a [[Sage]] and over a century older than [[Mercy]]. She is known for her legendary passion for humanity and her commitment to the [[Akura]] philosophy, which dictates that humans must be harsh to survive and protect civilization from the wilderness. [[Charity]] often maintains a calm, expressionless, or even unnerving demeanor, though she is capable of intense emotion and deep grief, such as when mourning her grand-nephew [[Harmony]]. She is a skilled maker of elixirs and has been known to dress in simple, peasant-like clothing consisting of stained smocks. In combat or crisis, she has demonstrated significant power, including using a shield to intercept a blow from a [[Dreadgod]]. She is deeply connected to her family hierarchy, particularly her grandmother, and holds a strong resentment toward factions led by [[sacred beasts]].}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Aunt Charity]] is the niece of the [[Heart Sage]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Aunt Charity]] advised [[Mercy]] to keep a calm head and a cool heart.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Aunt Charity]] told [[Pride]] to rest.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Heart Sage]], Aunt [[Charity]] is known to be a great listener, though her presence can often feel unnerving to those around her. During the relief efforts, she noted that [[Lindon]] had been assisting with the work. She was seen carrying a demon-faced shield and utilized a [[void key]] to retrieve a pill. Following these events, she entered a period of recovery.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Aunt Charity]] says [[Lindon]] has been helping with the relief effort.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Aunt Charity]] is a [[Heart Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Aunt Charity]] carried a demon-faced shield.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Aunt Charity]] used a [[void key]] to retrieve a pill.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Aunt Charity]] is a great listener but people find her unnerving.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Aunt Charity]] is in recovery.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Aunt Charity]] had to hold [[Akura Malice]] back from blowing up a region.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Aunt Charity]] makes good elixirs.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Aunt Charity]] gathered [[Mercy]] up in her arms.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Keep a calm head and a cool heart, and you will do us proud."<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“No! Aunt Charity said you have to rest!”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
